reason: PRD.md is missing documentation for shell_exec tool and Python support in code_exec, and still describes code_exec as using AsyncFunction eval instead of quickjs-emscripten sandbox. Tasks task-1775539719830 and task-1775559026329 are blocked because PM cannot write to PRD.md.
proposedChange: 1) Add shell_exec tool section documenting its interface and behavior. 2) Update code_exec section to reflect Python support. 3) Update sandbox description from 'AsyncFunction eval' to 'quickjs-emscripten sandbox'. 4) Add shellResults field to AgenticResult schema.
